summary: Completed testing of My Jobs feature - Family jobs and Payday jobs for children (K-5). All 14 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test parent and child users with linked relationship
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Jobs feature fully implemented and tested. Child can create family/payday jobs (max 3 each), parent can approve/reject/pay. Admin can edit guidebook content.

child_endpoints.POST /api/child/jobs: Working - creates family/payday jobs with max 3 limit enforced
child_endpoints.GET /api/child/jobs: Working - returns family_jobs and payday_jobs arrays

parent_endpoints.PUT /api/parent/child-jobs/{job_id}/appr: Working - approves with payment details for payday jobs
parent_endpoints.PUT /api/parent/child-jobs/{job_id}/reje: Working - rejects job and creates notification
parent_endpoints.POST /api/parent/child-jobs/{job_id}/pay: Working - pays and transfers to child's digital wallet

frontend_pages./my-jobs (Child): Working - shows Family Jobs (0/3) and Payday Jobs (0/3) with Add/Delete functionality, Guide button shows guidebook
frontend_pages./parent-dashboard (Parent): Working - Children's Jobs section shows pending jobs with Set Pay/Reject buttons
frontend_pages./admin Jobs Guide tab: Working - Jobs Guidebook Management with Child's Guide and Parent's Guide textareas, Save button
